top_signals.title: PGIM Sees ECB Hike in June as French, Spanish Inflation Rises
top_signals.summary: PGIM economist Katharine Neiss weighs the impact of inflation data on European Central Bank policy as consumer prices in France and Spain accelerated to the fastest level since 2024. "My base case is that the ECB will hike 25 basis points at their June meeting," Neiss says on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: French and Spanish Prices Jump, Boosting Case for ECB Hike
top_signals.summary: Inflation in France and Spain accelerated to the fastest level since 2024, backing the case for the European Central Bank to raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asia’s rich fear losing the family fortune — but many still have no succession plans, survey shows
top_signals.summary: Asia's wealthy families want to preserve their fortunes across generations, but many still lack basic succession plans, according to a new Lombard Odier survey.
